recommendations.title: Cam
recommendations.overview: A young camgirl discovers that she’s inexplicably been replaced on her site with an exact replica of herself.

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: Nickel Boys
recommendations.overview: Chronicles the powerful friendship between two young Black teenagers navigating the harrowing trials of reform school together in Florida.

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: Cracks
recommendations.overview: Jealousy flares after the headmistress of an elite boarding school for girls becomes obsessed with a new student.

recommendations.title: Mario
recommendations.overview: Two young gay soccer players get caught up between the politics of the game and the politics of love.

recommendations.title: Shelby Oaks
recommendations.overview: A woman's obsessive search for her missing sister leads her into a terrifying mystery at the hands of an unknown evil.

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.

recommendations.title: The Sense of an Ending
recommendations.overview: A man becomes haunted by his past and is presented with a mysterious legacy that causes him to re-think his current situation in life.

recommendations.title: Urban Legends: Final Cut
